title: 我每天六点起床
subtitle: Daily Routines, Time Expressions, Frequency Adverbs
assistant_message: Today we learn: daily routines (起床, 上班, 睡觉), time expressions (早上, 晚上, 每天), and frequency adverbs (经常, 有时候).

grammar.explanation: In Chinese, time expressions come before the verb. Time + Subject + Verb.
grammar.explanation_id: Dalam bahasa Mandarin, ekspresi waktu datang sebelum kata kerja. Waktu + Subjek + Kata Kerja.

examples.translation: I get up at 6 every day.
He goes to work at 8 in the morning.

grammar.point: Frequency Adverbs (经常, 有时候, 总是)
grammar.point_id: Kata Keterangan Frekuensi (经常, 有时候, 总是)
grammar.explanation: Place frequency adverbs before the verb. 经常 (often), 有时候 (sometimes), 总是 (always).
grammar.explanation_id: Letakkan kata keterangan frekuensi sebelum kata kerja. 经常 (sering), 有时候 (kadang-kadang), 总是 (selalu).

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Li Ming
dialogue.translation: What time do you get up every day?
dialogue.translation_id: Kamu bangun jam berapa setiap hari?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Wang Fang
dialogue.pinyin: Wǒ měitiān liù diǎn qǐchuáng. Nǐ ne?
dialogue.translation: I get up at 6 every day. And you?
dialogue.translation_id: Saya bangun jam 6 setiap hari. Kamu?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Li Ming
dialogue.chinese: 我六点半起床。早上做什么？
dialogue.pinyin: Wǒ liù diǎn bàn qǐchuáng. Zǎoshang zuò shénme?
dialogue.translation: I get up at 6:30. What do you do in the morning?
dialogue.translation_id: Saya bangun jam 6:30. Kamu melakukan apa di pagi hari?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Wang Fang
dialogue.chinese: 我刷牙洗脸，然后吃早饭。
dialogue.pinyin: Wǒ shuāyá xǐliǎn, ránhòu chī zǎofàn.
dialogue.translation: I brush my teeth and wash my face, then eat breakfast.
dialogue.translation_id: Saya sikat gigi dan cuci muka, lalu makan sarapan.

exercises.question: How do you say 'every day' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'setiap hari' dalam bahasa Mandarin?

exercises.question: How to say 'I sleep at 10 PM' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'Saya tidur jam 10 malam' dalam bahasa Mandarin?

exercises.question: Choose the correct time order sentence
exercises.question_id: Pilih kalimat urutan waktu yang benar
options_id: Saya bangun jam 6 setiap hari (salah urutan)
